body:
## Problem

The 90+ `/drummer/<slug>/<category>` gear sub-pages (e.g. /drummer/joey-jordison/cymbals) have a **URL bug in their BreadcrumbList** and **missing CollectionPage schema**.

Current handler (`api/meta/[...path].js:899-922`):

```js
articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'BreadcrumbList',
  itemListElement: [
    { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 1, name: 'Home', item: BASE_URL },
    { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 2, name: drummer.name, item: `${BASE_URL}/${drummerSlug}` },  // ← BUG: missing /drummer/ prefix
    { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 3, name: categoryLabel, item: `${BASE_URL}/drummer/${drummerSlug}/${category}` },
  ],
}),
```

**Two issues:**
1. **BreadcrumbList URL bug:** Position-2 item URL is `https://metalforge.io/joey-jordison` (404) instead of `https://metalforge.io/drummer/joey-jordison` (live page)
2. **BreadcrumbList in wrong field:** BreadcrumbList is inside `articleSchema` (raw JSON string) instead of in `breadcrumbSchema`. The proper pattern (used by all other page types) is to put the BreadcrumbList in `breadcrumbSchema` as an array of `{name, url}` objects and let the renderer generate the JSON-LD.
3. **No CollectionPage schema:** These pages list gear items for a category — they should carry CollectionPage schema for entity-type signal.

## Fix

File: `api/meta/[...path].js` — lines 899–922 (drummerCategoryMatch block)

```js
return {
  title: ...,
  description: ...,
  type: 'website',
  url: ...,
  // Replace wrong articleSchema BreadcrumbList with correct CollectionPage
  articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
    '@context': 'https://schema.org',
    '@type': 'CollectionPage',
    name: `${drummer.name} ${categoryLabel}`,
    description: `Complete ${categoryLabel.toLowerCase()} gear for ${drummer.name} (${drummer.band})`,
    url: `${BASE_URL}/drummer/${drummerSlug}/${category}`,
    publisher: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
  }),
  // Correct breadcrumb with fixed drummer URL
  breadcrumbSchema: [
    { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
    { name: drummer.name, url: `${BASE_URL}/drummer/${drummerSlug}` },  // ← fixed: /drummer/ prefix
    { name: categoryLabel, url: `${BASE_URL}/drummer/${drummerSlug}/${category}` },
  ],
};
```

## Pages affected
~90 pages: all drummer × gear-category combinations where `drummer.gear[category]` exists (e.g. /drummer/joey-jordison/cymbals, /drummer/lars-ulrich/drums)

## Quality gate
- [ ] BreadcrumbList position-2 item URL is `/drummer/<slug>` not `/<slug>`
- [ ] BreadcrumbList is in `breadcrumbSchema` (not inside articleSchema string)
- [ ] CollectionPage emits as separate JSON-LD entity in SSR
- [ ] Google Rich Results Test validates on a sample page (e.g. /drummer/joey-jordison/cymbals)

## Done
- [ ] `api/meta/[...path].js` drummerCategoryMatch block returns CollectionPage (articleSchema) + correct 3-level BreadcrumbList (breadcrumbSchema)
title: SEO: /drummer/<slug>/<category> pages — fix broken BreadcrumbList URL + add CollectionPage schema (~90 pages)
